/usr/bin/c++  -pthread   CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/camera_status.cc.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/capture_thread.cc.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/publisher_thread.cc.o  -o main  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libpaho-mqtt3a.so -lpaho-mqttpp3 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.6.2 -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0
